meaning: 外科手术进行时发生(或遇到,采取)的
examples: Demonstrate the techniques for preparing intraoperative cytology smears.
There were no intraoperative complications related to the locking plate systems.
The usual recovery time from an intraoperative peripheral nerve injury is 3 to 12 months.
One patient who was preparing for a heart valve replacement seemed slightly calmer after her surgeon showed her an intraoperative video of the procedure.
